summary: Repair cross-department collaboration approver routing and show every project-block approver beside the correct status.

notes: Disables broad TEO parent aliases that incorrectly routed CC submitters to Design Consulting owners.
Disables unscoped civil and MEP aliases while retaining explicit cost_specialty rules.
Refreshes only affected running, uncompleted collaboration nodes; historical approval actions remain unchanged.
Each project block now shows all resolved approver names immediately before its status badge.
Approver names are no longer repeated in the stage footer.
A non-applicable skipped project can no longer make waiting projects in the same stage appear approved.
Non-applicable project blocks show 无需审批 instead of a fabricated approver name.

verification: Run npx vite build from frontend with production VITE_* variables and VITE_APP_VERSION=V0.18.39.
Dry-run migration 136 in a production transaction and roll it back after checking CC and MEP routing probes.
Run deploy/scripts/pre-deploy-check.sh on the cloud host with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.39.
Run scripts/smoke-frontend-render.mjs against production with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.39.
known_warnings: Vite still reports large production chunks for existing application bundles.
